name: Xylitol
description: A naturally occurring five-carbon sugar alcohol that cavity-causing bacteria (S. mutans) cannot metabolize, effectively starving them while stimulating remineralizing saliva.
appearance: White crystalline powder or granules; sweet taste with cooling sensation
chemistry: Sugar alcohol S. mutans cannot metabolize. Starves cavity bacteria. Clinical evidence. Stimulates remineralizing saliva.
warnings: Extremely toxic to dogs. GI upset if >15g swallowed.
